creator: sgies1963@t-online.de
text:
Hardware:
ECS K7S5A Pro
1024Mb Ram DDR400 Kingston (2x512MB)
Geforce 4200 Ti - 64Mb  (AGP-Aperturesize 256Mb)
HDD PATA one Maxtor 40Gb
         two Quantum Bigfoot 6,4Gb
         two Quantum Fireball 15,0 Gb
LG DVD-Rom
Mitsumi CD-Burner 54xSpeed
Via USB2.0 PCI-Controller
Silicon Image Sil0680a IDE-Raid-Controller
LG 24" TFT-Monitor

Installation of the OS was without problems. Update of system without errors. Shutdown and reboot without error. Switch to console without error. Switching account causes black screen. STRG+ALT+DEL reboots system. Shutdown screen will be shown.

How-To-Repeat: Only the switching between accounts causes the error. The error is a black screen. This error happens always using the Nvidia 96xx driver.
